CITY WATER

pages.raw_text:
ment that the water rents have been
a little high. The council has low
cred the rates to the consumers
with the large properties who are
willing to use meters, but has of
fered no inducement to the owner
of the small home, paying 80 cents
to 81 per month. as the meter plan
offers but little chance to save.


However, the chief kick with the
city water plant is not so much in
it's rates as in the continued short
age of water each summer This
complaint, it is believed, will not
exist after present improvements,
calling for s550,000. are completed


The financial showing of the
water plant proves that the people
can own and operate public utility
and make it pay if they set their
heads to it.
